description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior features a stark contrast between black and white facades, with large rectangular windows arranged in a clean, geometric pattern. The house sits on a wooden deck that extends into an outdoor patio area, furnished with a table, chairs, and a large umbrella. Several trees and shrubs are positioned around the property, adding greenery and shade. The main entryway is accessible via a small set of steps and is partially sheltered by the overhanging upper floor. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story cubic house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, large windows, and a wooden deck patio with outdoor furniture and surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, main entryway, patio with umbrella, and a large tree to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white facade, extended wooden deck, and two trees flanking the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with white exterior, visible upper and lower windows, and a tree behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black facade, patio furniture, umbrella, and trees on both sides.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, small steps, and a partially covered porch integrated into the cubic structure.
